message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker — close FUZZ-P1.4, advance DROPIN-124 + FUZZ-P1.9

Issue status changes in .beads/issues.jsonl:

- bd-34188 (FUZZ-P1.4: Session JSONL proptest): in_progress → closed
  Implemented 12 proptest functions covering SessionEntry deserialization
  (256 cases), corrupted/malformed input (256 cases), arbitrary bytes
  (256 cases), valid round-trip (256 cases), full JSONL load with mixed
  valid/invalid lines (128 cases), orphaned parent links (128 cases),
  ensure_entry_ids uniqueness (128 cases), SessionHeader boundary values
  (256 cases), plus 4 deterministic edge-case tests. All pass, clippy clean.

- bd-359pl (DROPIN-124: JSON mode tool/extension UI events): open → in_progress
  Work started on matching tool lifecycle events and extension UI
  request/response flows for JSON mode parity.

- bd-388hn (FUZZ-P1.9: Extension hostcall dispatch proptest): open → in_progress
  Work started on expanding proptest coverage for session ops, provider
  registration, capability bypass, and large payload stress testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
